entities.name: LAND DEGRADATION
entities.description: The deterioration of the environmental quality of land and natural resources

entities.description: The means of securing the basic necessities of life for people living in rural areas

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: The state of lacking sufficient financial resources to meet basic needs

entities.name: DISTRIBUTION OF INCOME
entities.description: The way in which a nation's total GDP is spread among its population

entities.name: INTER-GENERATIONAL EQUITY
entities.description: Fairness in the distribution of resources between current and future generations

entities.name: SMALLHOLDERS
entities.description: Farmers who own or manage small plots of land

entities.name: BUFFER STOCKS
entities.description: Reserves of food or resources held to stabilize prices or ensure food security

entities.name: VULNERABILITY
entities.description: The state of being exposed to the possibility of being harmed or suffering from resource depletion

entities.name: FRAGILE ECOSYSTEMS
entities.description: Ecological systems that are easily disturbed or damaged

entities.name: ARID REGIONS
entities.description: Areas characterized by a severe lack of available water

entities.name: SEMI-ARID REGIONS
entities.description: Areas with low rainfall, between arid and humid climates

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE INTENSIFICATION OF AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Increasing agricultural productivity without adverse environmental impact

entities.name: LAND CONSERVATION AND MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Practices used to protect and maintain land resources

entities.name: POLICY CHALLENGE
entities.description: A difficult problem that requires a policy-based solution
